name: QA Mill
description: Intelligent mutation testing and AI-powered test generation platform that automates test creation, improves coverage, and validates code quality. Supports multiple LLM providers with intelligent fallback systems.

name: NagVoice
description: AI-powered personal productivity assistant that captures routines, reminders, and schedules from voice, text, images, PDFs, and calendars, then intelligently organizes them into actionable reminders with smart notifications.

name: Thinkraft
description: Shape your startup idea into investor-ready narrative.

name: Career Guidance AI
description: Helps students and professionals explore suitable career paths using structured prompts and knowledge retrieval.

name: Resume Builder AI
description: Generates structured professional resumes using guided inputs and prompt engineering.

name: Idea Generation Lab
description: Interactive AI prompts to explore ideas, personas, value propositions, and unmet needs.
